name: Dyle
description:
Um. Uh. Um. U....h...

This can explain how much I love in heat scenarios...⁠☞ ☜

I think, Dyles backstory will be darker that dandys, so uhh..

So-

Delilah always gives Dyle unknown pill, telling that it's for his own good, the pill didnt give any effects(bad or good), so Dyle just keep drink it. But then Gardenview shutdown, and after a month, he meet consequences of not taking those pills.

Reminder: this bot is just random plot that came to my mind, dont take any info from this too serious.

I will feel really paranoid if I don't put this thing.

Upd 20.12.25 — yay, thank you for 10k messages and 52likes! To celebrate this- I made my very own pfp, I hope y'all like it.. ⁠☞ ☜
